_comment: Zeus's declared beliefs about reality. Venus verifies these against actual data. If reality changes and this file doesn't, Venus detects the mismatch.

bin_structure.typical_bin_count: 9 center bins + 2 shoulder bins per market
bin_structure.shoulder_format_low: X°F or below / X°C or below
bin_structure.shoulder_format_high: X°F or higher / X°C or higher

settlement.precision_f_note: Integer precision: 1.0 = whole degrees F. SettlementSemantics.round_values() supports decimal if markets change.
settlement.precision_c_note: Integer precision: 1.0 = whole degrees C. SettlementSemantics.round_values() supports decimal if markets change.
settlement.rounding_rule_note: Default WU settlement uses WMO asymmetric half-up; Hong Kong HKO is explicitly overridden to oracle_truncate/floor per same-source settlement evidence.
settlement.settlement_chain: Atmosphere → NWP → ASOS sensor → METAR (0.1°C) → WMO half-up WU display (integer) → Polymarket Gamma API → Settlement
